name: blog-ai-monorepo
description: Unified startup scripts for Blog AI Platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev:node: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run server --prefix server"
scripts.dev:python: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "server_python\.venv\Scripts\uvicorn app:app --reload --port 5000 --app-dir server_python"
